query: I have a half-formed idea for a neighborhood repair exchange and need help making it concrete.
This thought keeps returning, but I cannot tell whether it should be a tool, service, or essay.
Can we shape this loose meeting idea into one outcome I can test next week?
Continue the concept from my notes and help me settle what it wants to become.
I remember a fragment of a project from last month. Help me recover it and choose a first milestone.
Give this rough product thought a concrete form, then make the next safe move.
We explored three directions earlier. Help me revert the last choice and recheck the design.
I want to scrap this direction without losing the reasoning behind it.
Turn this feeling that our reports are useless into a small object we can test.
I do not know what the deliverable is yet, but I know the problem I want to change.
What is the capital of Iceland?
Fix the failing parser test in src/parser.test.ts and run the suite.
Summarize this attached report in five bullets.
Send the approved invoice to the recipient listed in the ticket.
Create a repository skill that validates CSV files.
Show me the weather for tomorrow.
Run the deployment plan in deploy.md exactly as written.
We already chose the outcome. Write the final announcement from this approved brief.
List every decision recorded in project-log.md without changing them.
Delete the scrapped draft directory now.
